notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Sam Antonacci inside-the-park HR
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (rules check), call on the field was upheld: Sam Antonacci hits an inside-the-park home run (1) on a ground ball down the left-field line. Everson Pereira scores.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi grounds into a double play, pitcher James McCann to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Chase Meidroth scores. Tristan Peters to 3rd. Reese McGuire out at 2nd. Andrew Benintendi out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi grounds into a double play, pitcher James McCann to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Chase Meidroth scores. Tristan Peters to 3rd. Reese McGuire out at 2nd. Andrew Benintendi out at 1st.
